publishedAbstract: * Jenkins image fails with java not found. * Unable to provision Jenkins image and show below error: ~~~ /usr/local/bin/jenkins-common.sh: line 33: java: command not found Migrating slave image configuration to current version tag... + exec java-XX:+UseParallelGC-XX:MinHeapFreeRatio=5-XX:MaxHeapFreeRatio=10-XX:GCTimeRatio=4-XX:AdaptiveSizePolicyWeight=90-Xmx1024m-Dfile.encoding=UTF8-Djavamelody.displayed-counters=log,error-Duser.home=/var/lib/jenkins-Djavamelody.application-name=JENKINS-jar /usr/lib/jenkins/jenkins.war /usr/libexec/s2i/run: line 485: exec: java: not found ~~~
publishedTitle: Jenkins image version v3.11.146 fails with error: java not found.
